zh.lifeSummary: 當Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau於1319年出生在波蘭武奧吉武奧吉 福德尼可盧斯吉其隆納 格奧拉時，他的父親Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II27歲，母親Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel23歲。他於1337年9月6日與Anna poland Polcka結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1369年4月8日在波蘭多爾諾希利a斯吉波維亞特 格奧洛福斯吉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau于1319年出生在波兰武奧吉武奧吉 福德尼可盧斯吉其隆納 格奧拉时，他的父亲Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II27岁，母亲Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel23岁。他于1337年9月6日与Anna poland Polcka结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1369年4月8日在波兰多爾諾希利a斯吉波維亞特 格奧洛福斯吉享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: Zelazny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Janusz, Rajmund.
Polish (Żelazny): from the adjective żelazny ‘iron’, a nickname for a strong personality or someone who ruled ‘with a rod of iron’.

en.lifeSummary: When Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau was born in 1319, in Zielona Góra, Koluszki, Łódź East, Łódź, Poland, his father, Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II, was 27 and his mother, Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel, was 23. He married Anna poland Polcka on 6 September 1337. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 April 1369, in Góra County, Lower Silesia, Poland, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau est né en 1319, à Zielona Góra, Koluszki, Łódzki wschodni, łódzkie, Pologne, son père, Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Anna poland Polcka le 6 septembre 1337. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 avril 1369, à Powiat górowski, dolnośląskie, Pologne, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau 1319 in Zielona Góra, Koluszki, Łódzki wschodni, łódzkie, Polen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II 27 und seine Mutter Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel 23. Er hat am 6. September 1337 Anna poland Polcka geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. April 1369 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Powiat górowski, Niederschlesien, Polen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau è nato il nel 1319 nel Zielona Góra, Koluszki, Łódzki wschodni, łódzkie, Polonia, il suo padre, Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Anna poland Polcka il 6 settembre 1337. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 aprile 1369, nel Powiat górowski, dolnośląskie, Polonia, all'età di 50 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau(이)가 1319년 폴란드 lo드즈키 lo드즈키 w슈드니 콜루스즈키 지론아 그o라에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1337년 9월 6일 Anna poland Polcka(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1369년 4월 8일 폴란드 도노sa스키 파위앳 그o로우스키에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau nasceu em 1319, em Zielona Góra, Koluszki, Łódzki wschodni, łódzkie, Polônia, seu pai, Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna poland Polcka em 6 de setembro de 1337. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de abril de 1369, em Powiat górowski, dolnośląskie, Polônia, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau родился в 1319 г. в местности зиелона гoра, колусзки, loдзки вщодни, loдзки, Польша, его отцу по имени Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna poland Polcka 6 сентября 1337 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 апреля 1369 г. в местности поуят гoроуски, долноsлaски, Польша в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau nació en 1319, en Zielona Góra, Koluszki, Łódzki wschodni, łódzkie, Polonia, su papá, Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Anna poland Polcka el 6 de septiembre de 1337. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de abril de 1369, en Powiat górowski, dolnośląskie, Polonia, a la edad de 50 años.
